session.name: MPI-200 LTX quality tiers — resolver variant axis + arch detection + cards + 4-template save-node swap + tier UI (code complete)

goal.original: MPI-200: ship an LTX-2.3 balanced quality tier (smaller transformer that FITS 32GB) alongside the bf16 high tier, to kill the MPI-197 bf16-eviction stage boundary; build the arch selection UNIVERSAL + card-based for hundreds of future models.
goal.summary: All code COMPLETE + auto-verified (13/13 resolver tests, e2e resolution proof, gpuArch 17-case, footprint demo, all node --check). NOT committed (mpi-end will commit). Blocked only on: mxfp8 weight finishing its R2 upload overnight, then the live A/B on the pods.

completed: Generic runtime-variant resolver axis (resolveModelDeps.js) — universal, card-based, additive, composes with engine axis; 13/13 tests incl new testVariantAxis
Shared gpuArch.js classifier (browser-safe ESM, one source, server+client); 17-case check

Client arch resolver remoteEngineClient.arch/archSync/warmLocalArch + /system/gpu-info gpu.arch; arch threaded through all consumers (commandExecutor resolve-once, modelRegistry gates, MpiModelManager, MpiPromptBox, footprint)
Two cards models.js: ltx-23 (high, bf16) + new ltx-23-balanced (variants.arch: blackwell->mxfp8, modern->fp8); both name 'LTX 2.3' (badge disambiguates)
Two deps dependencies.js hashed: ltx23-transformer-fp8 + ltx23-transformer-mxfp8
generate_ltx.py 3-variant loop -> 12 LTX workflow files (only UNETLoader differs, bf16 stamped too)
All 4 video templates swapped to MpiSaveVideo node (LTX + Wan i2v/t2v + Wan5B); orchestrate.py --all rebuilt; no CreateVideo left; app captures by title->videos key transparently
tierLetterFor() helper -> gallery cards + prompt-box button show H/B/L tier letter
R2 upload: bf16 + fp8_scaled DONE (verified via lsf, fp8 == 25226571988 bytes exact)
pending: Verify mxfp8_block32 finished its overnight R2 upload (rclone lsf, size == 24052755552, + HTTP HEAD the public URL)

LIVE A/B on pods (user has 5090 + 4090): 5090 mxfp8 clean-load on v0.27+cu130 + no LTX2_NAG artifact (#576); 4090 fp8_scaled; eviction-floor collapse vs bf16 48s@10s/116s@20s (measure via pod /history + per-phase log NOT UI); quality vs bf16 locked seed
On live-proof -> move card MPI-200 to done

next_action.description: Verify mxfp8_block32 landed on R2 overnight (rclone lsf cubric-r2:cubric-models/vision/models/diffusion_models/ — expect size 24052755552 + HTTP HEAD https://models.cubric.studio/vision/models/diffusion_models/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1_transformer_only_mxfp8_block32.safetensors), then run the live A/B on the pods (5090 mxfp8 + 4090 fp8, eviction-floor proof vs bf16). On live-proof, move MPI-200 to done.

key_decisions: Tier UX = separate model cards same modelFamily (sizeTier contract), NOT one card with a toggle — user decision; badge H/B/L disambiguates

Arch selection = a GENERIC card-declared variant axis (not a bespoke arch axis) — user directive: universal for hundreds of future models (arch nodes, LoRAs, any runtime token); zero resolver code per future axis
Additive design: variantTokens trailing param defaults {} so all ~15 existing engine callers are byte-unchanged; engine axis untouched
Backend resolve sites stay UNION (no arch token) — permissive filter + shared-dep protection; NO server-side variant heal (arch has no stale-mirror race, YAGNI)
Free fp8_e4m3fn_fast probe SKIPPED — bf16 file stays 42GB in VRAM regardless of weight_dtype, so it never fits 32GB; probe measures the wrong axis

MpiSaveVideo swap is transparent to app+script: app captures by node TITLE (Output_Video/Output_Preview) -> videos output key; script gate matches by title. No app/script edits needed beyond re-export
MpiSaveVideo gains NO generation time (save step isn't the bottleneck; CPU x264 encode) — swapped Wan for pipeline consistency only, user's call
constraints: Models are NOT version-bumped — new deps only, do not touch appVersion
RunPod = the REMOTE code path only; a local-engine tier fix is NOT proven by any pod run
Measure boundary timing via pod /history timestamps + per-phase log, NOT UI timing
mxfp8 needs weight_dtype=mxfp8 + our v0.27+cu130 stack (native Blackwell path); Ada/older dequant so they take fp8_scaled
Kijai comfy-format weights ONLY — official Lightricks fp8 repo is broken
R2 upload background task bbkmgtfbx running capped 3.5 MB/s; machine stays on so it finishes overnight (~2h from ~01:30Z)
DO NOT re-open: NVFP4 (rejected), low tier (deferred, needs GGUF), fp8_input_scaled_v3 (TRAP — v1.0 weights not 1.1)
files_modified: comfy_workflows/Wan22_i2v.json + Wan22_i2v_stage2.json + Wan22_t2v.json + Wan22_t2v_stage2.json + Wan5B_i2v.json + Wan5B_t2v.json
comfy_workflows/scripts/workflow_generation/*_template.json (LTX + Wan i2v/t2v/5B — user re-exported with MpiSaveVideo)

resume_prompt: Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/b3b67a87-9b6c-4416-88dd-bc8bbaecb572.json and use mpi-continue to continue MPI-200 (LTX quality tiers). All code is complete and auto-verified from the prior session; nothing is blocked in code. First verify the mxfp8_block32 weight finished its overnight R2 upload (rclone lsf cubric-r2:cubric-models/vision/models/diffusion_models/ — expect 24052755552 bytes, then HTTP HEAD the public URL). Then run the live A/B on the pods: the user has a 5090 (check mxfp8 loads clean on v0.27+cu130 and has no LTX2_NAG mxfp8 artifact, kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes #576) and a 4090 (fp8_scaled). The decisive test is whether the balanced tier collapses the bf16 stage boundary (48s@10s / 116s@20s on 32GB) — measure via the pod /history timestamps and per-phase log, NOT UI timing. Quality A/B vs bf16 on a locked seed (faces/text/motion). On live-proof, move MPI-200 to done. Do NOT re-open the fp8_e4m3fn probe, NVFP4, the low tier, or fp8_input_scaled_v3 (v1.0 trap).
